cases.query: How do I safely isolate the CP-20 pump?

relevant_sources.text_contains: close the suction valve, close the discharge valve and drain the casing

cases.query: Which grease and quantity do the pump bearings need?
What should I inspect when pump outlet pressure is low?

relevant_sources.text_contains: inspect the suction strainer for blockage

cases.query: How should I drain condensate from the air receiver?

relevant_sources.text_contains: vent the receiver until the pressure gauge reads zero

cases.query: What is the correct AC-40 drive-belt deflection?
The compressor shows T-07. What must I check?

relevant_sources.text_contains: Check that the ventilation grille is clear and that the cooling fan turns freely

cases.query: How far should I turn a conveyor tracking screw?
What does conveyor code S-14 mean?

relevant_sources.text_contains: infeed photoelectric sensor remained blocked for more than 20 seconds

cases.query: Which oil is used to top up the conveyor gearbox?
What is the CP-20 motor mounting bolt torque?
What is the AC-40 air-filter part number?
What is the maximum BC-12 belt speed?
